title: Amy Tangerine + Mixbook
excerpt: Super excited to announce my collaboration with Mixbook ! A few months ago I got an email from them asking if I wanted to work with them on creating some card and address label designs. Since I am always up…
body:
Super excited to announce my collaboration with Mixbook! A few months ago I got an email from them asking if I wanted to work with them on creating some card and address label designs. Since I am always up for awesome creative collaborations, I said yes, and now they are available right here.

Thought it would be fun to share some behind the scenes of the development process and what became of the scripted words, watercolor swatches and doodles. It's amazing how the written images can go from doodles on a page to actual printed cards. The quality of the cards is wonderful, with flat and folded options. There are coordinated designs on the backs of each card, and I also designed sets of corresponding address labels. And I think the coolest part of all of this is that you all get to customize these cards with your own photos!

Would love for you to check out the cards and address labels! Let me know which one is your favorite!
